new_player_bonus.description: Lady E (World Cup variant) welcomes new players to Lady E Luck — warm, inviting, belonging. 'The game starts here. Your bonus is waiting.'

daily_bonus_wheel.description: Urgent daily bonus wheel reminder — 'Resets at midnight. Have you spun yet?' Lucky Lou variant holding wheel.

referral_code.description: Penalty Kick Free Spin referral push. Code: REF-WORLDCUP-847. 'Pass it like a perfect assist. You both score.'

daily_bonus.description: Quick daily bonus reminder — 'Before the final whistle, claim yours.' Countdown urgency.

todays_special_bonus.description: Today's Special: Hat Trick Bonus — 3 recharges during match hours (3PM–6PM) = stacked bonus. Golden stadium aesthetic. 'Three. Times. Three. Wins.'

acts.name: THE OPENING
acts.energy: High voltage launch — wake up the crowd, set the theme

posts.title: Match Day at Lady E Luck
posts.description: Opening cinematic reel: Lady E in World Cup referee dress standing at center of a golden casino stadium. A soccer ball rolls into frame and transforms into a spinning gold casino chip. Golden whistle sound, then music drop. Lady E looks at camera — a slow, confident smile. Text-free visual. Sets the entire day's energy.

posts.title: Golden Boot Morning
posts.description: Wide cinematic shot of the Lady E Luck casino floor styled as a luxury stadium — emerald green carpet, gold arch lights, gold card tables. The Golden Dealer stands at the far end, motionless, a single gold coin balanced on his fingertip. No text, no words.

posts.title: Today's Match Day Energy
posts.description: Lucky Lou (World Cup variant) in green-and-gold soccer jersey + fishing hat with soccer ball sticker, standing in front of a stadium tunnel that glows gold. He's pumped up, fist raised. Behind him: the Lady E Luck logo glows like stadium floodlights.

acts.name: THE WELCOME
acts.energy: Warm, inviting — introduce characters, welcome new players

posts.title: New Player Bonus — The Game Starts Here
posts.description: Lady E (World Cup variant — black and gold striped referee dress, gold whistle) stands at a golden entrance arch. Arms open in welcome, warm confident smile. Behind her: a grand emerald-lit casino hall stretching back like a stadium concourse. Foreground: scattered gold coins and a glowing welcome banner (visual, no text). Cinematic depth-of-field.

posts.title: Lady E Welcomes You
posts.description: Close-up portrait: Lady E in World Cup outfit, looking directly into camera, soft warm gold light, slight smile. Regal and inviting. Background: shallow-focus emerald green stadium lights.

posts.title: Meet Lucky Lou — He's Back
posts.description: Lucky Lou (World Cup variant) bursting out of a green locker room door into golden light, arms wide, huge grin, soccer jersey, fishing hat, clover in hand. Joy and momentum. This is his comeback.

acts.name: THE GOLDEN RUSH
acts.energy: Peak deals energy — urgency, exclusivity, referral push, match-day alignment

posts.title: Hat Trick Bonus — Today Only
posts.description: Three gold casino chips stacked on a soccer penalty spot on a dark emerald turf. Behind the chips: a goal net dripping golden coins. Warm directional stadium floodlight from above. Dramatic, luxurious. No text in image.

posts.title: Penalty Kick Free Spin — Referral Code Drop
posts.description: Lucky Lou (World Cup variant) in mid-kick pose, leg extended, kicking a soccer ball that trails golden sparks. The ball is morphing into a casino chip mid-air. Background: roaring stadium, all in emerald and gold. Perfect action freeze-frame.

posts.title: Hat Trick Bonus — Story Reminder
posts.description: Overhead shot of three casino chips arranged in a triangle on dark emerald velvet. Each chip glows gold from within. Dramatic downlight. Background: faint stadium crowd silhouette.

posts.title: Golden Boot Jackpot — Mid-Day Drop
posts.description: Short cinematic reel: The Golden Dealer walks slowly through a casino floor styled as a stadium. He stops, removes a glowing golden boot trophy from inside his jacket, and places it on the card table. He looks up, half-shadowed under wide-brim hat. A single sentence on his lips: 'The boot belongs to the biggest.' Camera pushes in slowly. Atmosphere: distant crowd roar fading to casino ambient.

acts.name: JACKPOT PARADE
acts.energy: Community wins, Argentina match energy, daily bonus push, maximum evening engagement

posts.title: Daily Bonus Wheel — Spin Before Midnight
posts.description: Close overhead shot of a spinning bonus wheel glowing emerald and gold. The spinning creates golden motion blur trails. At the center: a 4-leaf clover. Lucky Lou's hand is reaching in from frame edge to spin it. Urgency and excitement.

posts.title: Daily Bonus — Claim It Now
posts.description: Lady E (World Cup outfit) pointing directly at camera, confident expression, gold whistle around neck, slight lean forward. Behind her: a golden countdown glow. Direct, powerful, personal.

posts.title: Summer Crew Jackpot Celebration
posts.description: The Summer Crew — 4 diverse players, mix of ages and backgrounds — celebrating together in an emerald-lit casino lounge styled with World Cup screen backgrounds. Champagne flutes (no alcohol labels), gold confetti raining, huge smiles. Lucky Lou is in the middle, clover over his head, soccer jersey, beaming. Group shot, wide angle, warm gold lighting from above.

posts.title: Match Night at Lady E Luck
posts.description: Side-angle wide shot of the Lady E Luck lounge — players seated, multiple screens showing a golden pitch (no real team identifiers), emerald and gold ambient lighting, luxurious casino atmosphere. Everyone looks engaged and excited. Cinematic, warm, premium.

acts.name: GOLDEN HOUR
acts.energy: Mystery, finale, tomorrow tease — Lucky Lou always wins at day's end

posts.title: Halftime Reload — Mystery Drop
posts.description: Close-up of a glowing golden envelope on dark green velvet. The envelope pulses with inner light, embossed with the Lady E Luck crown logo (visual, not text). Behind it: midnight stadium lights dim to a single spotlight. Mysterious, exclusive, urgent.

posts.title: Lucky Lou Wins — The Final Whistle
posts.description: Lucky Lou (World Cup variant) reaction reel: He's watching a screen, tense — then the 'final whistle' sounds (stadium sound effect), and he ERUPTS. He jumps, clover flying up, fishing hat going sideways, soccer jersey, gold confetti exploding. He pumps his fist, looks at camera, huge grin. 'He ALWAYS ends the day winning.' Slow-mo replay of the fist pump. Energy: pure joy.

song_of_the_day.title: Golden Kick
song_of_the_day.artist: Lady E (feat. The Lady E Luck Crew)
song_of_the_day.instruments: Stadium crowd roar intro, Afrobeats percussion, 808 bass, brass horns, hand drums, synth shimmer, coin-drop sound effects woven in

lyrics.intro:
Ohhhh ohhhh ohhhh... (crowd chant builds)
Lady E Luck, tonight we rise
The pitch is golden, gold is the prize
lyrics.verse_1:
Friday night, the stadium glows
Everybody here, everybody knows
Dark green and gold, that's our colors right
We don't just play — we WIN tonight
Boot on the ball, spin on the wheel
Every moment here is real
Lucky Lou said 'Watch me go'
Golden Dealer said 'Put it on the show'
lyrics.pre_chorus:
Match day, pay day, Lady E say
Score your bonus, don't delay
The whistle blows at midnight sharp
But right now — we party from the heart
lyrics.chorus:
Golden Kick, golden spin
Lady E Luck, let the games begin
Score big, win big, tonight's the night
Golden boot shining, golden light
Golden Kick — (aye aye aye)
Golden Spin — (aye aye aye)
We don't lose, we don't lose
Lady E Luck — Golden Kick!
lyrics.verse_2:
Argentina in Miami, 6 o'clock
We watching every second, we can't stop
Three recharges equal Hat Trick win
Pass your code — let your people in
Halftime Reload at the midnight hour
Mystery drop, feel the power
The Golden Dealer tips his hat
You already know what's after that
lyrics.bridge:
Ohhhh — tonight we celebrate
250 years and the World Cup great
USA soil, Lady E floor
Golden Friday, we want MORE
(crowd chant: More! More! More!)
Lucky Lou says he always wins
And tonight — it begins again
lyrics.final_chorus:
Golden Kick, golden spin
Lady E Luck, let the games begin
Score big, win big, tonight's the night
Golden boot shining, golden light
Golden Kick — (aye aye aye)
Golden Spin — (aye aye aye)
We don't lose, we don't lose
Lady E Luck — Golden Kick!
lyrics.outro:
Lady E Luck... Golden Kickoff...
World Cup Friday... we don't stop...
Ohhhh ohhhh ohhhh...
(crowd roar fades to coin drops)
See you at the Golden Hour.

character_arcs.LADY_E: Opens the day as the commanding referee-inspired figure who sets the rules and the tone. Welcomes new players mid-morning with warmth and power. Returns at evening to drive daily bonus urgency. Anchors the brand's premium identity throughout.
character_arcs.LUCKY_LOU: Introduced mid-morning as the lovable underdog who's match-day ready. Nearly loses at every turn during the day but keeps his spirit. At Golden Hour (10PM+) — he WINS. Celebrates the final whistle. His arc always ends in victory.
character_arcs.GOLDEN_DEALER: Silent and mysterious. Appears in Act 1 to set atmosphere and again in Act 3 to announce the Golden Boot Jackpot with a single line. Never explains. Never loses. His presence signals that something big is about to happen.
